summary: Iteration 24: Regression testing for performance/architecture fixes (H1, M1, P3, A3). All 10 requested test scenarios pass. No regressions found in any core flow. Both manager and referee demo logins work correctly, all dashboards, messages, settings, profile, and games pages load without errors.

test_results.constants_js_exists: PASS — src/constants.js exists with ROLES, GAME_STATUS, ASSIGNMENT_STATUS, CONNECTION_STATUS, NOTIFICATION_TYPES, PAYMENT_STATUS all exported
test_results.H1_fix_batch_game_query: PASS — chunkArray(gameIds, 30) present in firestoreService.js referee branch (lines 172-180)
test_results.H1_fix_batchUnassign: PASS — batchUnassignRefereesRecord uses chunkArray(gameIds, 30) with 'in' query (lines 482-490)
test_results.P3_fix_filteredMessages_useMemo: PASS — const filteredMessages = useMemo(...) on line 40-44 of Messages.jsx
test_results.login_page_loads: PASS — /login renders with Try Demo Account button
test_results.demo_login_manager: PASS — Log in as Manager button works, redirects to /manager
test_results.manager_dashboard_loads: PASS — /dashboard shows 'Welcome back, Demo Manager' with stats cards
test_results.demo_login_referee: PASS — Log in as Referee button works, redirects to /dashboard
test_results.referee_dashboard_loads: PASS — /dashboard shows 'Welcome back, Demo Referee' with stats cards
test_results.messages_page_manager: PASS — messages-page-header and messages-search-input testids found; 7 messages shown
test_results.messages_search_filter_manager: PASS — useMemo filteredMessages works: 'game' search returns 2 of 7 messages
test_results.messages_page_referee: PASS — same page structure loads for referee role
test_results.settings_page_loads: PASS — settings-page testid found, all 7 notification toggles (gameAssignments/scheduleChanges/paymentUpdates/messages/emailNotifications/pushNotifications/smsNotifications) visible
test_results.manager_profile_change_photo: PASS — Change Photo button visible and enabled
test_results.referee_profile_change_photo: PASS — Change Photo button visible; 45 Games and Performance Ratings section shown
test_results.games_page_manager: PASS — Game Management page loads with In Progress/Upcoming/Completed sections
test_results.games_page_referee: PASS — Same layout, shows Upcoming: Metro Eagles vs Northside Lions
test_results.console_errors_app_level: PASS — 0 app-level console errors. Only Google Analytics (gtag.js) network failures (expected in test environment, not app errors)

notes: Console 'Fetch error from :' is from Vite's custom fetch monkey-patch intercepting Google Analytics gtag.js failures — expected in headless test env, NOT app errors.
All 4 performance fixes verified both via static code inspection and live runtime behavior.
filteredMessages useMemo correctly memoizes on [messages, searchTerm] dependency array — search results update correctly.
availabilityByReferee Map replaces O(n²) filter-inside-map pattern with O(n) pre-build.
chunkArray(gameIds, 30) handles Firestore 'in' query 30-item limit correctly.
batchUnassignRefereesRecord also uses chunkArray for the same Firestore limit.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 all green. H1/M1/P3/A3 performance fixes verified in code and confirmed no regressions in login, dashboard, messages, settings, profile, and games flows for both manager and referee roles. constants.js at src/constants.js has 6 exports (ROLES, GAME_STATUS, ASSIGNMENT_STATUS, CONNECTION_STATUS, NOTIFICATION_TYPES, PAYMENT_STATUS). Messages useMemo search filters correctly (subject, from, content). Settings page shows all 7 notification toggles. Both profiles show Change Photo button.
